channel.title: Italian on Recipe Logbook
channel.description: Recent content in Italian on Recipe Logbook

item.title: Chicken Parmesan
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken breast or tenderloin
  • ¾ cup seasoned bread crumbs
  • ¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 T butter, melted (or olive oil)
  • ¾ cup mozzarella cheese
  • 1 cup spaghetti sauce
  • Cooking spray
  • Spaghetti noodles

Instructions

Pound chicken. Melt butter in bowl. Combine breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese in another bowl. Dip chicken in butter then heavily dip in breadcrumbs. Place chicken on baking sheet. Spray top of chicken with cooking spray. Bake in 450° oven for 25 minutes, flipping chicken halfway. Spoon spaghetti sauce over chicken. Top with mozzarella cheese. Bake 5 more minutes until cheese is melted.

item.title: Lasagna
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb uncooked lasagna noodles (for 3 layers)
  • 1 lb ground beef (or less)
  • 2 teaspoons onion powder
  • ½ teaspoon garlic powder
  • 2 Tablespoons minced parsley
  • 1½ Tablespoon oregano
  • 1-1/2 teaspoons salt
  • ½ teaspoon black pepper
  • (1) 12 oz can tomato paste (or (2) 6 oz cans)
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) grated mozzarella cheese
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) grated sharp cheddar cheese
  • ¾ cup parmesan cheese

Instructions

Boil noodles as directed on box. Add oil so noodles don’t stick together. Drain. Cool.

item.title: Meatballs
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • ⅓ cup Progresso Italian style bread crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • ½ tsp salt (or ½ tsp garlic)
  • ½ tsp pepper
  • 1 tsp Mrs. Dash seasoning (Italian or Garlic & Herbs)
  • ⅓ cup parmesan cheese
  • 1-24 oz Prego spaghetti sauce
  • Cooking spray

Note: If using green pepper, put it in sauce to cook instead of sauté.

Instructions

Add bread crumbs to ground beef mix with a few sprinkles of water to help hold together and roll into meatballs.

item.title: Mostaccioli
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb penne noodles
  • ½ lb ground beef
  • 1-24 oz Prego sauce
  • 8 ozs (2 cups) shredded mozzarella cheese
  • Red and/or green peppers, chopped (optional)
  • Pepper, onion (optional)

Instructions

Cook noodles as directed. Drain. Brown ground beef. Drain beef, if necessary. Add peppers, if desired, to beef mixture and cook for several minutes. Place ground beef mixture in large bowl. Add cheese to ground beef mixture and mix together. Add sauce to beef mixture and mix together. Add noodles to desired consistency. Put in 8"x8" baking pan (or 9x13 pan if using all noodles). Cover baking pan with aluminum foil. Bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Remove aluminum foil from top of baking pan. Stir and bake until bubbly around 10 minutes.

item.title: Sauteed Mushrooms and Caramelized Onions
item.description:
Sauteed Mushrooms

Ingredients

  • ½ lb (3 cups) mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 Tablespoon butter
  • ¼ Teaspoon salt
  • ⅛ Teaspoon pepper
  • 1 clove garlic, finely chopped (or ¼ Teaspoon garlic powder)
  • Chopped parsley, if desired

Instructions

In skillet over medium-high heat melt butter, add garlic, salt & pepper. Add mushrooms. Cook 4–6 minutes until mushrooms are light brown. Sprinkle with parsley.

Caramelized Onions

Ingredients

  • Sweet onion, sliced
  • 2 Tablespoons butter
  • ¼ Teaspoon salt

Instructions

In skillet melt butter over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add salt. Cook an additional 35–40 minutes until onions are deep golden brown.
